name: azure-stack
description: Azure services and tools including AI, storage, compute, messaging, monitoring, identity, and developer tools for building cloud-native applications on Azure.

plugins.name: azure-stack
plugins.description: Azure Python and Terraform stack for Claude Code. 71 skills, 12 agents (azure-python-* and azure-terraform-*), orchestration commands, smart hooks, governance audit, and session tooling for cloud-native development on Azure.
